name: OmopConditionConditionOccurrenceView
title: Condition → condition_occurrence (FHIR-flat, stage 1)
description:
Stage 1 of FHIR→OMOP: one flat row per Condition, preserving raw FHIR values. Stage 2 SQL resolves person_id / visit_occurrence_id (via reference resolution), condition_concept_id (via vocab Maps-to with domain='Condition').

One (code_system, code_value) pair instead of per-vocabulary columns — same pattern as Observation v0.3. Adding ICD10CM/ICD9CM/other vocabs requires no schema change, only system_aliases mapping in stage 2.

column.name: id
column.description: FHIR Condition.id (Synthea UUID). → condition_source_value + surrogate condition_occurrence_id.

column.name: subject_ref
column.description: Reference to the Patient. Stage 2 takes trailing UUID via regexp_replace. → person_id.

column.name: encounter_ref
column.description: Reference to the encounter where this condition was diagnosed/recorded. → visit_occurrence_id.

column.name: code_system
column.description: Coding system URL (typically http://snomed.info/sct for Synthea, possibly http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm for real data). → vocabulary_id via system_aliases in stage 2.

column.name: code_value
column.description: Source code → condition_concept_id (after Maps-to + domain='Condition' filter). Also kept verbatim in condition_source_value.

column.name: code_text
column.description: Human-readable label, fallback when code_value is missing.

column.name: onset_period_start
column.description: onsetPeriod.start branch. Used if onset_dt is absent.

column.name: abatement_period_end
column.description: abatementPeriod.end branch. Fallback when abatement_dt absent.

column.name: clinical_status_code
column.description: active/recurrence/relapse/inactive/remission/resolved (from condition-clinical CodeSystem). → condition_status_source_value (+ optional concept lookup).

column.name: recorded_date
column.description: When the condition was recorded. Useful fallback for condition_start_date.
